Module me.stringdotjar.flixelgdx.core
Package me.stringdotjar.flixelgdx.util

Class FlixelColor

java.lang.Object
me.stringdotjar.flixelgdx.util.FlixelColor
public class FlixelColor extends Object
Mutable color wrapper that owns a single Color instance for stable tinting and tween endpoints without per-frame allocations.

Shared presets such as WHITE and RED point at the same instances as libGDX Color namesakes. Mutating a preset affects every place that uses that reference. For a private copy, use new FlixelColor(FlixelColor.RED) or setColor(FlixelColor) on your own instance.

Use getGdxColor() when you need component access, lerping, or batch tinting; use getColor() when you need a compact RGBA8888 value.

  • Constructor Details

    • FlixelColor

      public FlixelColor()
      Creates a new color with the default white color.

    • FlixelColor

      public FlixelColor(int r, int g, int b, int a)
      Creates a new color with the given RGBA values. Values must be in the range 0-255.
      Parameters:
      r - The red component.
      g - The green component.
      b - The blue component.
      a - The alpha component.

    • FlixelColor

      public FlixelColor(float r, float g, float b, float a)
      Creates a new color with the given RGBA values. Values must be in the range 0-1.
      Parameters:
      r - The red component.
      g - The green component.
      b - The blue component.
      a - The alpha component.

    • FlixelColor

      public FlixelColor(int rgba8888)
      Creates a new color from the given packed RGBA8888 value.
      Parameters:
      rgba8888 - The packed RGBA8888 value.

    • FlixelColor

      public FlixelColor(@NotNull @NotNull com.badlogic.gdx.graphics.Color source)
      Creates a new color from the given Color value.
      Parameters:
      source - The Color value to copy.

  • Method Details

    • getColor

      public int getColor()
      Returns:
      Packed RGBA8888, same as libGDX Color.rgba8888(Color) on the backing color.

    • setColor

      public void setColor(@NotNull @NotNull com.badlogic.gdx.graphics.Color other)
      Copies RGBA from other into this wrapper.
      Parameters:
      other - The libGDX color to copy. Must not be null.

    • setColor

      public void setColor(@NotNull @NotNull FlixelColor other)
      Copies RGBA from other into this wrapper.
      Parameters:
      other - The Flixel color to copy. Must not be null.

    • getGdxColor

      @NotNull public @NotNull com.badlogic.gdx.graphics.Color getGdxColor()
      Returns:
      The backing libGDX color (mutable). Must not be null.
